title: ksh bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.0.6-14.0.1]
- Disable _AST_no_spawnveg for taskset workaround [Orabug: 26754277]

[3:1.0.6-14]
- Fix arbitrary command execution/code injection bugs
  Resolves: RHEL-99063

[3:1.0.6-13]
- Fix SIGPIPE subshell regression
  Resolves: RHEL-92646

[3:1.0.6-12]
- Fix recalling lines starting with whitespace
  Resolves: RHEL-74464

[3:1.0.6-11]
- Fix segfault upon SIGWINCH after 'stty -echo'
  Resolves: RHEL-91097

[3:1.0.6-10]
- Fix long multibyte characters paste issue via ssh
  Resolves: RHEL-87561

[3:1.0.6-9]
- Fix 'stty -echo' in scripts
  Resolves: RHEL-83043

[3:1.0.6-8]
- Fix segfault on starting ksh with no TERM env var
  Resolves: RHEL-83283
full_text:
[1.0.6-14.0.1]
- Disable _AST_no_spawnveg for taskset workaround [Orabug: 26754277]

[3:1.0.6-14]
- Fix arbitrary command execution/code injection bugs
  Resolves: RHEL-99063

[3:1.0.6-13]
- Fix SIGPIPE subshell regression
  Resolves: RHEL-92646

[3:1.0.6-12]
- Fix recalling lines starting with whitespace
  Resolves: RHEL-74464

[3:1.0.6-11]
- Fix segfault upon SIGWINCH after 'stty -echo'
  Resolves: RHEL-91097

[3:1.0.6-10]
- Fix long multibyte characters paste issue via ssh
  Resolves: RHEL-87561

[3:1.0.6-9]
- Fix 'stty -echo' in scripts
  Resolves: RHEL-83043

[3:1.0.6-8]
- Fix segfault on starting ksh with no TERM env var
  Resolves: RHEL-83283

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20871.html
